messages.body: Hi Grace,  I hope you're doing well.  I’m Shikha, the Senior Account Manager at Zoca, and I’ll be your primary point of contact moving forward. I’m here to ensure everything is running smoothly and that we’re aligned wit…

Hello. Hello. Hi. Great. Right. I agree. Hello. Hi. How are you? How's it going? Good. All right. Great. My name is Tina. And I am, you know, from Zoka. Actually, my team wanted to reach out to you. Yeah. Do you remember…
